meaning: n.令人震惊的人或事物,耸人听闻的故事或小说
examples: The result is quite a shocker but I am not surprised.
Another shocker? A lot of that waste is perfectly functional.
Needless to say, I think it'll be a real shocker at Mobile World Congress.
We've had a shocker in the pool since 1988, when we won three medals.
The real shocker, though, is that VisitBritain will not be running advertising leveraging this unique opportunity.
